name: agent-case-share-skill
description: Search, read, publish, and edit Agent Case Share content and personal assets.

interface.shortDescription: Search and publish Agent Case Share content.
interface.longDescription: Search public and personal Agent Case Share content, including case, project, and paper detail APIs, and publish or edit tasks, articles, Markdown images, reusable assets, and asset metadata from AI coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Case Share to draft a hidden case.
Publish this Markdown article as a draft.
Upload these reusable assets to a case.
Find my uploaded Agent Case Share assets.
Read a project or paper detail by URL.
